job.title: Business Analyst
job.published: Published on 11 June 2026 · Position available immediately
job.desc.1: As a Business Analyst in Montpellier, you analyse business processes and translate functional requirements into IT solutions. You are the key interface between business teams and technical teams.
mission.2: Write user stories and functional specifications
mission.6: Manage the product backlog in coordination with the PO
profile.1: Bachelor's to Master's degree in Computer Science or management
profile.2: 3 to 6 years of experience in functional analysis
profile.3: Proficiency in Agile methodologies and associated tools (JIRA, Confluence)
profile.5: Connaissance d'un secteur métier (banque, assurance, santé) is a plus
